limitations: OCR markings are noisy and should be verified against the photo
short top-mark codes may map to multiple parts
datasheet/pinout matches are evidence, not proof, until package and circuit context agree

board_identity.description: Connector, adapter, breakout, or IO interface board

alternatives.description: Power conversion, protection, or distribution board
Controller, development, or embedded compute board
Motor, relay, solenoid, or high-current actuator driver board

functional_blocks.label: Input power/protection
functional_blocks.function: Accepts incoming power and protects downstream circuitry

functional_blocks.label: External IO/connectors
functional_blocks.function: Provides external electrical connections to a machine or host

likely_roles.description: Connects sensors, actuators, host systems, or service ports
Supplies, converts, or protects machine power rails
Runs firmware/control logic and coordinates IO
Switches current for motors, relays, solenoids, or loads

integration_notes: Treat connectors as machine interface points; build a pin map before splicing harnesses.
Connector regions are the best starting point for pinout tracing and machine-level integration.

splice_requirements: confirm mating connector and cable clearance

splicer_notes: pixel geometry must be calibrated to mm before mechanical placement
mounting holes, board thickness, connector height, and cable clearance require measurement or CAD
do electrical validation before powering any harvested/spliced module

warnings: crop/splice output is planning metadata only; it is not a validated mechanical or electrical design
visual topology confidence is low; hidden nets may make extracted modules unusable

limitations: single-image inference estimates board role; it does not identify exact manufacturer model
bottom-side parts, hidden traces, multilayer routing, and unlabeled ICs can change function
use OCR markings, datasheets, electrical tests, Gerber/KiCad files, or a known golden board for high-confidence intent

required_measurements: unpowered resistance between power and ground

limitations: pin assignments are inferred from labels and known pinouts; verify with continuity and voltage measurements
image-only connector geometry cannot determine exact pin order without calibration or close-up photos
do not power harvested modules until polarity, rails, and isolation are confirmed

strategy.reason: Top opportunity is Bench Power Supply Module with score 0.53.

limitations: value estimates are planning estimates until parts are tested and market prices are verified
salvaged modules need electrical validation before resale or reuse
e-commerce arbitrage requires listing price, shipping, failure rate, labor, and demand checks

issues.details: Short-circuit proximity checks were limited to the 120 longest trace regions out of 176 extracted regions
issues.recommendation: Use Gerber/KiCad input for exhaustive production net comparison

limitations: single-image trace extraction is a visual estimate, not a verified netlist
hidden, internal, bottom-side, and solder-mask-covered traces may be missed
use Gerber/KiCad/netlist input for high-confidence circuit topology
classical defect checks are candidate flags until validated against a golden board
lighting, glare, solder mask color, and board finish can cause false positives
production defect detection requires labeled line-specific defect data

current_capabilities: component localization and coarse class identification
candidate trace/connection extraction from visible copper geometry
candidate visual defect detection for burns, solder bridges, corrosion, and broken traces
explicit confidence, provenance, and review-required metadata
blockers: image-only topology confidence is below production threshold
calibrated camera/lighting fixture and focus checks
labeled defect dataset from the target production line
model/license review for any sourced checkpoints before redistribution

summary.summary_text: Found 2 components on this PCB. Components include: 2 connector. Visible topology estimate: 176 trace regions and 0 candidate connections at 0.35 confidence. Likely board role: io_interface_or_adapter at 0.64 confidence with 2 functional block candidate(s). OCR/marking lookup resolved evidence on 2 component(s). Machine connection map: 2 connector candidate(s) at 0.41 confidence. Best salvage/build opportunity: Bench Power Supply Module (build_from_salvage). Reference AOI not executed. Topology AOI not executed. Golden image AOI not executed. AOI readiness: prototype_ready. Project potential: excellent. No specific project recommendations available.
